title: Minecraft Bedrock Music Definitions
description: The music_definitions.json file defines which music tracks play in different biomes and game states. Each key is a biome or game state identifier that maps to music event configuration. Located at sounds/music_definitions.json in resource packs.

event_name.description: The sound event identifier that plays music for this biome/state.

min_delay.description: Minimum delay in seconds before music starts.

max_delay.description: Maximum delay in seconds before music starts.
